shell_worker.label: quick-signal
shell_worker.text: BEAM orchestrates workers while OpenShell isolates execution.

config.command:
TEXT="$(python - <<'PY'
import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
payload = json.loads(Path(os.environ['MN_INPUT_FILE']).read_text())
print(payload['text'])
PY
)"
WORD_COUNT="$(printf '%s\n' "$TEXT" | wc -w | tr -d ' ')"
CHAR_COUNT="$(printf '%s' "$TEXT" | wc -c | tr -d ' ')"
export TEXT WORD_COUNT CHAR_COUNT
python - <<'PY'
import json
import os
print(json.dumps({'text': os.environ['TEXT'], 'word_count': int(os.environ['WORD_COUNT']), 'char_count': int(os.environ['CHAR_COUNT'])}))
PY

python - <<'PY'
import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
payload = json.loads(Path(os.environ['MN_INPUT_FILE']).read_text())
shell_metrics = json.loads(payload['sandbox']['stdout'])
source = payload['input']
result = {
    'request_id': source['request_id'],
    'headline': f"{source['label']}: {shell_metrics['word_count']} words, {shell_metrics['char_count']} chars",
    'explanation': 'BEAM orchestrated the flow and OpenShell executed the worker commands in isolated sandboxes.',
    'text_preview': shell_metrics['text'][:40]
}
print(json.dumps(result))
PY
